text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out for a walk when I hear a familiar voice
beneath an overpass. I head down to check it out
and find...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I recommend using official light sticks! With
generic ones, you run the risk of them being
either too big or too bright!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Also, be careful not to wave them around too
much or it can totally kill the mood!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Students
text_block_list.text: Okay! You really do know everything!
choice_data_list: What are you all up to?
What are you all up to?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! These middle schoolers asked me to
teach them the finer points of enjoying a winning
concert!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
We only just got into Umamusume racing, so
we've got no idea what to do!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
We heard Digital's a master of all things fangirl,
so we asked her to take us under her wing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone, let's get back to training!
Now, picture the venue in your heads...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Feel the unifying force of the concert! The feeling
of not only you... but all the fans and all your
faves celebrating together!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
R-right! When we wave our lights, we should sync
our breathing with the people around us and
create one giant wave!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not just that, but when you're listening to the
music, it's important that you listen with intent! I
recommend that you watch some recordings of
the songs to prep for the live experience!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text: To... prep... Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Next topic! Let's see, next up is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think that about covers all the basics.
Sooo... how do you guys feel?

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Whew... You really are amazing. It's like you've
dedicated your whole life to this...

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, the two of us are total
newbs...

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
We're not qualified to even go to a winning
concert!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Qualified, hmmm... You know, it's not like I'm
particularly qualified either.

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Not even with all your knowledge and
experience?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not in that way! What I'm saying is there's no such
thing as being qualified!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All I want to do is come together with my oshis
and the other fans to make a performance
overflowing with love!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I just love my faves—my oshis—with everything
I've got!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When simping, you don't need anything else.
There are no special qualifications!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text: Love... I wonder if we have it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you have it? It's practically gushing out of you.

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It took courage to come and talk to me. You have
passion for concerts in your hearts... And all of
that is love.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Knowing the two of you will be out there cheering
on the Umas with me is just... the best feeling
ever!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text: We'll never forget our love for Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gwehehe... You two are up to your necks in the
ocean that is Horsegirl simping! ♪
choice_data_list:
It looks like the hatchlings are ready to leave
the nest.

From here on out, we can all enjoy the concerts
as fellow fans!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I think that's all I really have to
teach... But honestly, you two were ready from
the very start!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
There's no way that's true! But thanks to you, now
we have the confidence to get out there!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Next time we meet will definitely be at a concert!
Um... I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Me too... I'm gonna deepen my own love for
Umamusume even more!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Let's enjoy the otaku life together! ...Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's smile seems a bit different after
speaking with the kids.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now there's one more thing to look forward
to at concerts, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
About that... Actually, I... I want to simp for you,
Digital!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Me too! Your sincere love for Umamusume is so
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um, mmm.... Me?! You know there's plenty of
Umamusume cuter than me out there, right?!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text: I love how humble you are too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-I-I... I'm really happy to hear that! But still! What
do I do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital continues to squirm under the
passionate gazes of her new fans!
